name: Apple Search Ads
description: Apple Search Ads Campaign Management API v5 — App Store search-result ads. Two-leg auth: sign a JWT (ES256) with your team's private key + key id + Apple client_id (audience: appleid.apple.com), POST it to https://appleid.apple.com/auth/oauth2/token as client_assertion to get an access_token. Every API call needs Authorization: Bearer + X-AP-Context: orgId={orgId}.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: access_token
credential_fields.description: Bearer token from POST /auth/oauth2/token. Lifetime 1 hour.

credential_fields.name: org_id
credential_fields.label: Org ID
credential_fields.description: Apple Search Ads org/account id (numeric). Required in X-AP-Context.

credential_fields.name: client_id
credential_fields.label: Apple Client ID
credential_fields.description: Client ID from Search Ads UI > Account Settings > API. Format: SEARCHADS.<uuid>

credential_fields.name: team_id
credential_fields.label: Team ID
credential_fields.description: Team ID from Search Ads UI > Account Settings > API. Same value as Apple Client ID for most orgs.

credential_fields.name: key_id
credential_fields.label: Key ID
credential_fields.description: ES256 key identifier (kid) from Search Ads UI > Account Settings > API

credential_fields.name: private_key
credential_fields.label: Private Key (PEM)
credential_fields.description: EC private key (P-256). Used to sign the JWT client_assertion. PEM format starting with -----BEGIN EC PRIVATE KEY-----.

tools.name: list_campaigns
tools.description: List campaigns under the current org. Supports limit/offset paging and a sort + filter (Conditions[]) body.

tools.name: find_campaigns
tools.description: POST search for campaigns with conditions/orderBy/pagination. conditions[] entries: {field, operator (EQUALS|CONTAINS|GREATER_THAN|...), values}.

tools.name: create_campaign
tools.description: Create a campaign. Required: orgId (numeric), name, adamId (the iTunes app ID being promoted), countriesOrRegions, budgetAmount {amount, currency}, dailyBudgetAmount, billingEvent ('TAPS'), adChannelType (SEARCH|DISPLAY), supplySources (['APPSTORE_SEARCH_RESULTS'] for the default placement).

tools.name: update_campaign
tools.description: Update a campaign. Pass campaignId in path; body wraps fields under "campaign" plus a clearGeoTargetingOnCountryOrRegionChange flag when changing countries.

campaign.description: Fields to update — name, dailyBudgetAmount, status, etc.

tools.name: list_ad_groups
tools.description: List ad groups under a campaign.

tools.name: create_ad_group
tools.description: Create an ad group inside a campaign. Required: name, defaultBidAmount {amount, currency}, startTime (ISO8601), automatedKeywordsOptIn (true|false), pricingModel ('CPC'). targetingDimensions optionally narrow audience (gender, age range, device class, locality).

tools.name: list_targeting_keywords
tools.description: List keywords (targeting) under an ad group.

tools.name: create_targeting_keywords
tools.description: Bulk-add keywords to an ad group. Each item: text, matchType (EXACT|BROAD), bidAmount {amount, currency}, status (ACTIVE|PAUSED).

tools.name: list_negative_keywords
tools.description: List negative keywords scoped to a campaign.

tools.name: campaign_report
tools.description: Run a campaign-level performance report. groupBy (e.g. ["countryOrRegion"]) and granularity (DAILY|WEEKLY|MONTHLY|HOURLY) shape the result. selector lets you filter (conditions, fields, orderBy, pagination).

tools.name: ad_group_report
tools.description: Run an ad-group-level performance report under a campaign.

tools.name: keyword_report
tools.description: Run a keyword-level performance report (search terms, ROAS, CPA, install rate) under a campaign.
